items.title: Palantir (NASDAQ:PLTR) Beats Expectations in Strong Q2, Guides for Strong Full-Year Sales
items.description: Data-mining and analytics company Palantir (NYSE:PLTR) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q2 CY2025, with sales up 48% year on year to $1.00 billion. On top of that, next quarter’s revenue guidance ($1.09 billion at the midpoint) was surprisingly good and 10.5% above what analysts were expecting. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.16 per share was 15.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
